data.title: Save the Children initiates Bitcoin fund to hasten crisis aid payments and enhance crypto technology utilization.
data.description: Save the Children recently announced the launch of a new Bitcoin fund with the goal of facilitating faster distribution of cash aid in emergency situations. This initiative is also intended to broaden the organization's utilization of cryptocurrency technologies.

data.title: InstaMed® Pharmaceuticals report month-over-month hypergrowth, successful study, expands patented peptide platform nationwide.
data.description: In Salt Lake City on December 11, 2025, InstaMed® Pharmaceuticals revealed their innovative non-injectable peptide delivery system, InstaRelease®, through oral dissolving strips. This patented technology marks a significant advancement in biotechnology. The company announced record-breaking developments in this groundbreaking research.

data.title: Costco's Q1 revenue beats estimates at $67.31B, EPS surpasses expectations, sales up 6.4%, stock moving after hours.
data.description: Retail giant Costco Wholesale Corp (NASDAQ: COST) released its fiscal first-quarter financial results for 2026, following Thursday's closing bell. Key highlights from the report reveal that Costco recorded a revenue of $67.31 billion during Q1, surpassing analyst predictions of $67.14 billion. As a result, COST stock saw movement in after-hours trading. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: SK Commercial Realty secures leases for over 65,000 sq ft at Circle 75 Office Park in November, showcasing high demand and excellent service.
data.description: Atlanta based SK Commercial Realty (SKCR) has successfully finalized three major lease agreements at Circle 75 Office Park, further solidifying the firm's track record of providing outstanding outcomes. During the month of November, SKCR secured leases for a total of more than 65,000 square feet of space.

data.title: Forward Industries, Inc. reports fiscal year 2025 results with less than 1 month of Solana treasury activity, focusing on long-term SOL-per-share growth.
data.description: In New York, Forward Industries, Inc. (NASDAQ: FWDI) announced its financial results for the twelve months ending September 30, 2025. The company, known as the leading Solana treasury firm, highlighted its performance during Fiscal 2025. Despite the Solana treasury strategy being launched recently and contributing for less than a month, the company showcased disciplined execution throughout the quarter. This approach aimed to establish a strong base for long-term growth in SOL-per-share. Kyle S, a spokesperson, emphasized the company's commitment towards achieving this goal.

data.title: National Beverage Corp. (NASDAQ: FIZZ) reports Q2 earnings: Net sales $288M, Operating income $58M, EPS $.50. TTM: Net sales $1.2B, EBITDA $258M, EPS $1.99, Cash $269M.
data.description: National Beverage Corp. reported its second quarter results for the period ending November 1, 2025. Net sales for the quarter reached $288 million, with operating income rising to $58 million. Basic earnings per share also saw an increase to $0.50. Looking at the trailing twelve months, net sales rose to $1.2 billion and EBITDA increased by 63 basis points to $258 million. Earnings per share amounted to $1.99. Additionally, cash reserves grew by $156 million, reaching $269 million. These results reflect a positive trend for the company in the specified period.

data.title: BlueGrace Logistics partners with Triumph Network for faster, transparent and flexible carrier payments.
data.description: In a recent development, BlueGrace Logistics has decided to become a part of the Triumph Network. Through this partnership, BlueGrace Logistics aims to enhance its carrier payment process by utilizing Triumph Network's payment platform. The adoption of this platform is expected to bring about significant improvements in terms of speed, transparency, and flexibility in carrier payments. This move is crucial as it will allow BlueGrace Logistics to expedite payments to carriers, providing them with more efficient and accessible payment options.

data.title: Ithax Acquisition Corp. III priced its $200 million IPO on Nasdaq with ticker "ITHA", sponsored by Orestes Fintiklis.
data.description: A Special Purpose Acquisition Company (SPAC) called ITHAX Acquisition Corp III has disclosed the pricing for its upcoming listing on the Nasdaq stock exchange. The company will trade under the ticker symbol "ITHA" and is financially backed by Orestes Fintiklis.

data.title: 2025 was a successful year for Air Canada, reflecting on achievements with 12 Days of Cheer video, aiming for a bright 2026.
data.description: In Montreal, on December 11, 2025, Air Canada looks back on a year filled with remarkable accomplishments and breakthroughs as the year nears its end. The airline acknowledges and appreciates the loyalty of its customers, the unwavering dedication of its employees, and the valuable support from its partners, all of which have contributed to Air Canada's prominent position on a global scale. The essence of this success is depicted in the illuminating "12 Days of Cheer" video by the airline, emphasizing Air Canada's dedication to further advancing upon its achievements as it anticipates a promising year in 2026.

data.title: Broadcom's Q4 revenue hits $18.02B, beats estimates; stock up on earnings beat and AI revenue growth.
data.description: Broadcom Inc (NASDAQ: AVGO) recently released its Q4 financial results for fiscal 2025, revealing a revenue of $18.02 billion, surpassing analysts' expectations of $17.49 billion. The company also reported adjusted earnings of $1.95 per share, exceeding analyst forecasts of $1.86 per share. This represents a 28% increase in revenue compared to the previous year. Following this positive performance, AVGO stock is experiencing an upward trend in trading. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Teamsters Local 89 in Austin, Indiana, ratify new contract with Morgan Foods, strengthening wages, benefits, and worker protections.
data.description: In Austin, Indiana, on December 11, 2025, Members of Teamsters Local 89 have voted decisively to approve a new contract with Morgan Foods. The agreement, aimed at fortifying wages, benefits, and worker protections, was met with strong support from the workers at the food production facility.Key points of the contract include improved wages, enhanced benefits, and increased worker protections for the employees. The Teamsters at the facility played a crucial role in ratifying this agreement, showcasing strong solidarity and unity.

data.title: XRP's drop below $2 triggers buy signal with deeply negative funding rates. Will bullish momentum follow?
data.description: The price drop of XRP below the $2 mark has resulted in funding rates dropping to unusually low levels, typically prompting bullish investors to increase their positions. However, traders seem hesitant to take advantage of this opportunity.

data.title: ATN International, Inc. (Nasdaq: ATNI) declares a quarterly dividend of $0.275 per share, payable on Jan 9, 2026.
data.description: In Beverly, Massachusetts, on December 11, 2025, ATN International, Inc. (Nasdaq: ATNI) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.275 per share. This dividend will be paid on January 9, 2026, to all common stockholders recorded as of December 31, 2025.

data.title: Host Hotels & Resorts declares $0.20 quarterly dividend per share & $0.15 special dividend per share, totaling $0.95 for the year.
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland on December 11, 2025, Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NASDAQ: HST), the largest lodging real estate investment trust in the nation, disclosed that their board of directors approved a regular quarterly cash dividend totaling $0.20 per share. They also revealed a special dividend of $0.15 per share, making the total dividends declared for the year amount to $0.95 per share. This dividend will be disbursed on January 15, 2026, to stockholders recorded as of December 31, 2025.

data.title: Financial Institutions, Inc. completed $80.0M private placement of subordinated notes (Nasdaq: FISI).
data.description: Today, Financial Institutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: FISI) disclosed the successful finalization of a private placement involving $80.0 million worth of subordinated notes.

data.title: Abcourt Mines Inc. reports 94% approval rate for all resolutions at Annual Shareholders Meeting on Dec 10, 2025.
data.description: In Rouyn-Noranda, Quebec on December 11, 2025, Abcourt Mines Inc. disclosed the outcomes of its Annual Meeting of Shareholders on December 10, 2025. The corporation, trading under the tickers TSX Venture: ABI and OTCQB: ABMBF, happily reported that all resolutions introduced at the meeting received approval with over 94% of the shares voted in favor.

data.title: Upcoming comedy film "One Attempt Remaining" by Netflix teases plot involving a $35M missing crypto password dilemma.
data.description: A film called "One Attempt Remaining" tells the story of a couple attempting to recover access to millions of dollars in cryptocurrency. The movie reflects actual challenges faced in the world of cryptocurrency.

data.title: Lululemon stock climbs after Q3 earnings beat: $2.59 per share vs $2.27 estimate, revenue $2.57B vs $2.48B estimate.
data.description: Lululemon Athletica, Inc. saw a surge in its stock prices in after-hours trading following the release of its third quarter earnings report, surpassing both revenue and earnings expectations. The company reported earnings of $2.59 per share, exceeding analyst projections of $2.27 by 14.15%. Quarterly revenue came in at $2.57 billion, also surpassing the estimated $2.48 billion and showing growth from the previous year's $2.4 billion. For more details, visit the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: ASUR acquires URW Airports, expanding to US hubs. ASUR US Commercial Airports acquires URW Airports. - 93 characters
data.description: On December 11, 2025, in Mexico City, Grupo Aeroportuario del Sureste, S.A.B. de C.V. revealed that its subsidiary ASUR US Commercial Airports, LLC successfully finalized the purchase of URW Airports, LLC. This acquisition marks ASUR's expansion in the retail development and operations sector of terminals. Grupo Aeroportuario del Sureste, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: ASR; BMV: ASUR) reported this significant business deal with ASUR US Commercial Airports, LLC effectively acquiring URW Airports, LLC.

data.title: Materion Corp (NYSE: MTRN) appoints Thomas Edman to Board of Directors, expanding to 10 members.
data.description: In Cleveland, Materion Corporation (NYSE: MTRN) has added Thomas Edman to their Board of Directors, increasing the Board to 10 members, with Edman becoming the ninth independent director from January 21, 2026. Vinod M. Khilnani, Chairman of the Board, expressed excitement about this addition, citing Edman's vast experience in global electronics manufacturing sectors like semiconductors, aerospace, and defense.
